## Module.unmount() method

从document移除

**Signature:**

```typescript
unmount(passive?: boolean): void;
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  passive | boolean | _(Optional)_ 被动卸载，父模块释放或模块被删除时导致的卸载，此时不再保留srcDom.node，状态修改INIT，否则修改为UNMOUNTED |

**Returns:**

void
